data.title: Avalon Healthcare receives majority investment from WindRose Health Investors to drive Diagnostic Intelligence growth.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, in Tampa, Florida, Avalon Healthcare Solutions revealed a significant development as they announced a majority investment from WindRose Health Investors. This investment represents a crucial step for Avalon, a key player in Diagnostic Intelligence services for payers, as it provides them with enhanced resources to further their mission. Alongside this new investment, Avalon will continue to receive support from their current investor, Francisco. This strategic move solidifies Avalon's position in the healthcare industry and marks a significant milestone in their growth trajectory.

data.title: Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices California Properties hires new Relocation Director, Sarah Riach, to enhance services.
data.description: Sarah Riach, a seasoned real estate executive known for her expertise in leading relocation programs, has joined Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices California Properties in San Diego. Previously serving as a relocation director for a prominent national brokerage, she specialized in developing efficient processes and enhancing partnerships with relocation providers. With her wealth of experience, Riach is set to contribute to providing clients and stakeholders with a seamless, comprehensive service.

data.title: Franklin BSP Realty Trust, Inc. to release Q4 2025 results on Feb 11, 2026, after NYSE close. Conference call on Feb 12 at 9:00am ET. Website for details.
data.description: Franklin BSP Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: FBRT) has revealed that it is set to disclose its fourth quarter 2025 results on February 11, 2026, after the market closes. Following this release, on February 12, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET, the Company will conduct a conference call and live audio webcast to delve into their financial results. For further information on participating in the conference call and webcast, individuals can visit the Company’s website at https://ww...

data.title: Top Wall Street analysts expect PNC Financial Q4 earnings of $4.21/share, revenue of $5.95B; shares close at $212.32.
data.description: PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE: PNC) is set to unveil its fourth-quarter earnings prior to the market opening on Friday, Jan. 16. Analysts are anticipating a profit of $4.21 per share, surpassing the previous year's $3.77 per share. The consensus among analysts suggests that PNC Financial's quarterly revenue will hit $5.95 billion, up from $5.57 billion recorded last year. Furthermore, PNC recently announced a dividend of $1.70 per share on common stock. Despite this news, the company's shares experienced a slight 0.1% decrease, concluding the day at $212.32 on Wednesday. For additional insights, interested parties can review the latest analyst ratings on the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga Pro. Access the full article on Benzinga.com for more information.

data.title: Experian's Credit Builders Alliance benefits overlooked consumers, improving credit opportunities.
data.description: A recent report from Experian highlights the efforts of the Credit Builders Alliance in empowering underserved consumers. Based in Costa Mesa, Calif., the alliance has made significant strides in improving financial outcomes for individuals who are frequently overlooked. Through their initiatives, they have helped over 10,000 consumers build their credit scores and attain financial stability. Experian's research underscores the importance of such programs in driving progress and inclusivity within the financial sector.

data.title: Shane Porzio appointed as COO of Ionic Mineral Technologies for rare earths & critical minerals supply chain scale-up.
data.description: In Provo, Utah, Ionic Mineral Technologies has announced the appointment of Shane Porzio as the Chief Operating Officer. Porzio will oversee the expansion of the supply chain for rare earths and critical minerals. This move aims to enhance the company's operations and scale-up efforts.

data.title: Amazon's AWS introduces AWS European Sovereign Cloud in Germany with $9 billion investment and 2,800 jobs.
data.description: Amazon Web Services (AWS), the cloud computing division of Amazon.com Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN), has announced the launch of the AWS European Sovereign Cloud. This new cloud environment is based solely within the European Union and is completely separate from other AWS regions, both physically and logically. The first AWS region for the European Sovereign Cloud has been established in Brandenburg, Germany, signifying a substantial investment by Amazon with plans to invest over 7.8 billion euros (about $9 billion) in Germany. This investment is expected to support approximately 2,800 jobs annually. The platform is equipped with independent operation, robust technical safeguards, sovereign controls, and legal protections, specifically designed to cater to European governments and businesses dealing with sensitive data. The AWS European Sovereign Cloud offers a comprehensive set of security measures to meet the needs of customers requiring a secure cloud solution.

data.title: X-energy and SGL Carbon sign 10-year graphite supply agreement worth over $100 million for X-energy's Xe-100 SMR.
data.description: X-energy Reactor Company, LLC and SGL Carbon, LLC have revealed a 10-year graphite supply deal for X-energy’s Xe-100 small modular reactor. The agreement, which commences with a three-year contract worth more than $100 million for X-energy’s inaugural commercial deployment, is aimed at boosting production capabilities for upcoming ventures. This move underlines X-energy’s dedication to enhancing their SMR presence in the industry.

data.title: Schneider Electric Canada opens new HQ and EcoFit™ Center in Milton, Ontario, consolidates sites, reinforces commitment to innovation and sustainability. #SchneiderElectric #CanadaHQ #EcoFitCenter #MiltonON
data.description: Schneider Electric Canada, a renowned entity in energy management and industrial automation, has recently inaugurated its brand-new Canadian head office and EcoFit™ Center in Milton, Ontario. This move from Mississauga stands as a significant achievement in Schneider Electric’s Toronto & GTA Hub Strategy, showcasing their dedication to innovation, sustainability, and locally manufactured solutions. The fresh headquarters merges various locations into a contemporary facility.

data.title: Genesis Energy, L.P. (NYSE: GEL) declares quarterly cash distribution: $0.18 per common unit, $0.72 annually.
data.description: In Houston, Genesis Energy, L.P. (NYSE: GEL) revealed that its Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash distribution for Genesis common unit holders and Class A Convertible Preferred unit holders for Q4 of 2025. Common unit holders will receive $0.18 per quarter per common unit, totaling $0.72 annually per unit. Preferred unit holders will also receive a distribution, although the specific amount was not provided in the excerpt.

data.title: SeaPak debuts 3 new products: Chili Lime Shrimp, Breaded Flounder Tenders, & Breaded Scallops for quick, premium seafood meals at home.
data.description: SeaPak's latest products blend bold flavors, crisp textures, and high-quality ingredients to create convenient seafood meals at home. The newest offerings ensure a delicious dining experience in just a few minutes. Based in St. Simons Island, Georgia, SeaPak Shrimp & Seafood is a leading brand in the industry. Established on January 15, 2026, SeaPak aims to provide top-quality seafood products that cater to consumers' evolving tastes and preferences. Visit seapak.com for more information on their diverse range of offerings.

data.title: Rio Tinto partners with Amazon Web Services to supply low-carbon Nuton copper to U.S. Data Centers, marking AWS as the first customer for this innovative bioleaching technology; agreement spans two years.
data.description: Rio Tinto has revealed a new partnership with Amazon Web Services (AWS) in Tucson, Arizona. AWS will be the inaugural customer of Nuton® Technology after the successful large-scale implementation of the bioleaching technology at the Johnson Camp copper mine in the U.S. recently. This collaboration will last for two years, with AWS incorporating the initial batch of Nuton copper into its U.S. data centers. Additionally, AWS will offer cloud-based data and analytics services as part of the agreement.

data.title: Mitel introduces enhanced Global Partner Program for 6,000 partners worldwide, focusing on integrated hybrid communications.
data.description: Mitel, a renowned business communications company based in Ottawa, Ontario, has launched its updated Global Partner Program. This new program signifies a significant step in Mitel's initiative to provide an improved global partner experience. The program acknowledges partner business growth and expertise, especially as Mitel caters to the rising need for integrated hybrid communications worldwide. With over 6,000 partners globally, this initiative aims to offer a unified global framework and prog.

data.title: Semarchy reports global growth in 2025 with expanded customer base, new partnerships, and product launches. Strengthening leadership team.
data.description: In Phoenix, Semarchy has reported significant global growth this year, attributing it to customer expansion, strategic partnerships, and the successful introduction of Semarchy Data Platform (SDP) and the sole MDM native app for Snowflake. The company enhanced its executive leadership with key hires in Sales, Operations, and Product, aiming to meet the increasing need for reliable and regulated data to support successful AI projects.
